x_snc_airop_check_definition.ai_justification: License ownership data enables Now Assist SAM to route AI-generated optimization recommendations and reclamation tasks to the correct stakeholders. Without ownership, AI insights are generated but cannot be acted upon by the right people.
x_snc_airop_check_definition.check_script: (function() { var gaTotal = new GlideAggregate("alm_license"); gaTotal.addQuery("active", true); gaTotal.addAggregate("COUNT"); gaTotal.query(); var total = gaTotal.next() ? parseInt(gaTotal.getAggregate("COUNT")) : 0; if (total === 0) { return { status: "not_applicable", actualValue: "No active license records found", finding: "No active license records. License ownership cannot be assessed." }; } var gaOwned = new GlideAggregate("alm_license"); gaOwned.addQuery("active", true); gaOwned.addEncodedQuery("owned_byISNOTEMPTY^ORmanaged_byISNOTEMPTY^ORassigned_toISNOTEMPTY"); gaOwned.addAggregate("COUNT"); gaOwned.query(); var withOwner = gaOwned.next() ? parseInt(gaOwned.getAggregate("COUNT")) : 0; var pct = Math.round((withOwner / total) * 100); var actualValue = pct + "% of active licenses have an owner/manager (" + withOwner + "/" + total + ")"; if (pct >= 80) { return { status: "ready", actualValue: actualValue, finding: pct + "% of active licenses have ownership assigned. Now Assist SAM AI reclamation and optimization recommendations can be routed to the correct license owners." }; } else if (pct >= 50) { return { status: "needs_attention", actualValue: actualValue, finding: "Only " + pct + "% of active licenses have ownership assigned (target: 80%+). Now Assist SAM AI recommendations may not reach the correct stakeholders." }; } else { return { status: "not_ready", actualValue: actualValue, finding: "Only " + pct + "% of licenses have ownership assigned. Now Assist SAM AI recommendations cannot be routed without license ownership data." }; } })
x_snc_airop_check_definition.remediation_guidance: Assign owners, managers, or responsible parties to all active license records. Navigate to Software Asset Management > Licenses and populate the Owned By, Managed By, or Assigned To fields.

sys_update_version.name: x_snc_airop_check_definition_1bf89dc7cfd587108935fb251d851ca0
sys_update_version.payload: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update table="x_snc_airop_check_definition"><x_snc_airop_check_definition action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"><ai_justification><![CDATA[License ownership data enables Now Assist SAM to route AI-generated optimization recommendations and reclamation tasks to the correct stakeholders. Without ownership, AI insights are generated but cannot be acted upon by the right people.]]></ai_justification><check_name>License Ownership Configuration</check_name><check_script><![CDATA[(function() { var gaTotal = new GlideAggregate("alm_license"); gaTotal.addQuery("active", true); gaTotal.addAggregate("COUNT"); gaTotal.query(); var total = gaTotal.next() ? parseInt(gaTotal.getAggregate("COUNT")) : 0; if (total === 0) { return { status: "not_applicable", actualValue: "No active license records found", finding: "No active license records. License ownership cannot be assessed." }; } var gaOwned = new GlideAggregate("alm_license"); gaOwned.addQuery("active", true); gaOwned.addEncodedQuery("owned_byISNOTEMPTY^ORmanaged_byISNOTEMPTY^ORassigned_toISNOTEMPTY"); gaOwned.addAggregate("COUNT"); gaOwned.query(); var withOwner = gaOwned.next() ? parseInt(gaOwned.getAggregate("COUNT")) : 0; var pct = Math.round((withOwner / total) * 100); var actualValue = pct + "% of active licenses have an owner/manager (" + withOwner + "/" + total + ")"; if (pct >= 80) { return { status: "ready", actualValue: actualValue, finding: pct + "% of active licenses have ownership assigned. Now Assist SAM AI reclamation and optimization recommendations can be routed to the correct license owners." }; } else if (pct >= 50) { return { status: "needs_attention", actualValue: actualValue, finding: "Only " + pct + "% of active licenses have ownership assigned (target: 80%+). Now Assist SAM AI recommendations may not reach the correct stakeholders." }; } else { return { status: "not_ready", actualValue: actualValue, finding: "Only " + pct + "% of licenses have ownership assigned. Now Assist SAM AI recommendations cannot be routed without license ownership data." }; } })]]></check_script><is_active>true</is_active><is_clone_sensitive>false</is_clone_sensitive><is_manual>false</is_manual><module>SAM</module><number>CHK0000624</number><order>700</order><remediation_guidance>Assign owners, managers, or responsible parties to all active license records. Navigate to Software Asset Management > Licenses and populate the Owned By, Managed By, or Assigned To fields.</remediation_guidance><sys_class_name>x_snc_airop_check_definition</sys_class_name><sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by><sys_created_on>2026-06-10 06:41:21</sys_created_on><sys_id>1bf89dc7cfd587108935fb251d851ca0</sys_id><sys_mod_count>1</sys_mod_count><sys_name>License Ownership Configuration</sys_name><sys_package display_value="ServiceNow AI Readiness Optimization Platform" source="x_snc_airop">73e2562fcf244b908935fb251d851c78</sys_package><sys_policy/><sys_scope display_value="ServiceNow AI Readiness Optimization Platform">73e2562fcf244b908935fb251d851c78</sys_scope><sys_update_name>x_snc_airop_check_definition_1bf89dc7cfd587108935fb251d851ca0</sys_update_name><sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by><sys_updated_on>2026-06-10 06:54:01</sys_updated_on></x_snc_airop_check_definition></record_update>
